description: A threat actor attributed to North Korean state intelligence, active since at least 2009. Known for large-scale financial theft operations targeting cryptocurrency exchanges, financial institutions, and defence contractors.
scenario: Anomalous AWS API activity has been detected alongside suspicious endpoint behaviour. Financial system access patterns are outside normal baselines. Investigate the telemetry to determine whether this represents a financially motivated intrusion and assess the potential impact.
environment_note: This group frequently combines cloud infrastructure abuse with endpoint compromise. Pay close attention to AWS credential usage patterns and any cryptocurrency-related process activity on endpoints.
